allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; $screen = [System.Windows.Forms.Screen]::PrimaryScreen.Bounds; $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($screen.Width, $screen.Height\); $g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\); $g.CopyFromScreen\($screen.Location, [System.Drawing.Point]::Empty, $screen.Size\); $bmp.Save\("$env:TEMP\\audio_screenshot.png"\); $g.Dispose\(\); $bmp.Dispose\(\); echo "Screenshot saved")

PowerShell($python = \(Get-Command python\).Source; $WshShell = New-Object -ComObject WScript.Shell; $shortcut = $WshShell.CreateShortcut\("$env:USERPROFILE\\Desktop\\Descargador de Audio.lnk"\); $shortcut.TargetPath = $python; $shortcut.Arguments = "c:\\Users\\Tom\\python\\Audio.py"; $shortcut.WorkingDirectory = "c:\\Users\\Tom\\python"; $shortcut.Description = "Descargador de Audio"; $shortcut.Save\(\); echo "Acceso directo creado")

PowerShell($shell = New-Object -ComObject Shell.Application; $shell.MinimizeAll\(\); Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; $screen = [System.Windows.Forms.Screen]::PrimaryScreen.Bounds; $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($screen.Width, $screen.Height\); $g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\); $g.CopyFromScreen\($screen.Location, [System.Drawing.Point]::Empty, $screen.Size\); $bmp.Save\("$env:TEMP\\desktop2.png"\); $g.Dispose\(\); $bmp.Dispose\(\); echo "ok")
